ai_architect_verdict: The custom object architecture for Pipedrive in the B2B SaaS Startups industry should focus on mapping Deals to Sales Opportunities, Contacts to Decision Makers, and Companies to Target Accounts. This will enable the sales team to track and manage the sales process effectively. However, potential API bottlenecks may arise when integrating Pipedrive with other tools, such as marketing automation platforms or customer support software, due to the high volume of data being synced. To mitigate this, it's essential to implement data validation, error handling, and caching mechanisms to ensure seamless integration and optimal performance.
